nasb.text: Now Rachel had taken the household idols and put them in the camel’s saddle, and she sat on them. And Laban felt through all the tent but did not find them.

esv.text: Now Rachel had taken the household gods and put them in the camel’s saddle and sat on them. Laban felt all about the tent, but did not find them.

cnv.text: 拉結已經把神像放在駱駝的鞍下，自己坐在上面。拉班搜遍了帳棚，但沒有搜出甚麼。

ccb.text: 那时拉结已经把神像藏在骆驼的鞍座里，自己坐在上面。拉班搜遍了整个帐篷什么也找不到。

csbs.text: 瑞秋拿了家族神像，把它们放在骆驼的鞍子下，自己坐在上面。拉班摸遍了整个帐篷，也没有找到。
